verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque hæc fuissent rite celebrata, egressus est omnis Israël qui inventus fuerat in urbibus Juda, et fregerunt simulacra, succideruntque lucos, demoliti sunt excelsa, et altaria destruxerunt, non solum de universo Juda et Benjamin, sed et de Ephraim quoque et Manasse, donec penitus everterent : reversique sunt omnes filii Israël in possessiones et civitates suas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּכְכַלּ֣וֹת כׇּל־זֹ֗את יָצְא֨וּ כׇל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֥ל הַֽנִּמְצְאִים֮ לְעָרֵ֣י יְהוּדָה֒ וַיְשַׁבְּר֣וּ הַמַּצֵּב֣וֹת וַיְגַדְּע֣וּ הָאֲשֵׁרִ֡ים וַיְנַתְּצ֣וּ אֶת־הַ֠בָּמ֠וֹת וְאֶת־הַֽמִּזְבְּח֞וֹת מִכׇּל־יְהוּדָ֧ה וּבִנְיָמִ֛ן וּבְאֶפְרַ֥יִם וּמְנַשֶּׁ֖ה עַד־לְכַלֵּ֑ה וַיָּשׁ֜וּבוּ כׇּל־בְּנֵ֧י יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל אִ֥ישׁ לַאֲחֻזָּת֖וֹ לְעָרֵיהֶֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And when these things had been duly celebrated, all Israel that were found in the cities of Juda, went out, and they broke the idols, and cut down the groves, demolished the high places, and destroyed the altars, not only out of all Juda and Benjamin, but out of Ephraim also and Manasses, till they had utterly destroyed them: then all the children of Israel returned to their possessions and cities.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin nämät kaikki päätetyt olivat, läksivät kaikki Israelilaiset ulos, jotka Juudan kaupungeissa olivat, ja rikkoivat patsaat, ja hakkasivat maahan metsistöt, ja kukistivat korkeudet ja alttarit koko Juudasta, Benjaminista, Ephraimista ja Manassesta, siihenasti että ne peräti hävittivät. Ja Israelin lapset palasivat jokainen omainsa tykö kaupunkeihinsa.
verses.king_james: Now when all this was finished, all Israel that were present went out to the cities of Judah, and brake the images in pieces, and cut down the groves, and threw down the high places and the altars out of all Judah and Benjamin, in Ephraim also and Manasseh, until they had utterly destroyed them all. Then all the children of Israel returned, every man to his possession, into their own cities.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ezechias autem constituit turmas sacerdotales et Leviticas per divisiones suas, unumquemque in officio proprio, tam sacerdotum videlicet quam Levitarum, ad holocausta et pacifica, ut ministrarent et confiterentur, canerentque in portis castrorum Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲמֵ֣ד יְחִזְקִיָּ֡הוּ אֶת־מַחְלְק֣וֹת הַכֹּהֲנִ֣ים וְ֠הַלְוִיִּ֠ם עַֽל־מַחְלְקוֹתָ֞ם אִ֣ישׁ ׀ כְּפִ֣י עֲבֹדָת֗וֹ לַכֹּֽהֲנִים֙ וְלַלְוִיִּ֔ם לְעֹלָ֖ה וְלִשְׁלָמִ֑ים לְשָׁרֵת֙ וּלְהֹד֣וֹת וּלְהַלֵּ֔ל בְּשַׁעֲרֵ֖י מַחֲנ֥וֹת יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Ezechias appointed companies of the priests, and the Levites, by their courses, every man in his own office, to wit, both of the priests, and of the Levites, for holocausts, and for peace offerings, to minister, and to praise, and to sing in the gates of the camp of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Jehiskia asetti papit ja Leviläiset järjestykseensä, kunkin virkansa jälkeen, sekä papit että Leviläiset, polttouhrilla ja kiitosuhrilla, palvelemaan, kiittämään ja kunnioittamaan Herran leirien porteissa.
verses.king_james: And Hezekiah appointed the courses of the priests and the Levites after their courses, every man according to his service, the priests and Levites for burnt offerings and for peace offerings, to minister, and to give thanks, and to praise in the gates of the tents of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pars autem regis erat, ut de propria ejus substantia offerretur holocaustum, mane semper et vespere : sabbatis quoque, et calendis, et solemnitatibus ceteris, sicut scriptum est in lege Moysi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמְנָת֩ הַמֶּ֨לֶךְ מִן־רְכוּשׁ֜וֹ לָעֹל֗וֹת לְעֹלוֹת֙ הַבֹּ֣קֶר וְהָעֶ֔רֶב וְהָ֣עֹל֔וֹת לַשַּׁבָּת֖וֹת וְלֶחֳדָשִׁ֣ים וְלַמֹּעֲדִ֑ים כַּכָּת֖וּב בְּתוֹרַ֥ת יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the king's part was, that of his proper substance the holocaust should be offered always morning and evening, and on the sabbaths, and the new moons and the other solemnities, as it is written in the law of Moses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas antoi osan tavarastansa huomeneltain ja ehtoona polttouhriksi, ja sabbatin, uuden kuun ja juhlapäivän polttouhriksi, niinkuin kirjoitettu on Herran laissa.
verses.king_james: He appointed also the king’s portion of his substance for the burnt offerings, to wit, for the morning and evening burnt offerings, and the burnt offerings for the sabbaths, and for the new moons, and for the set feasts, as it is written in the law of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præcepit etiam populo habitantium Jerusalem ut darent partes sacerdotibus et Levitis, ut possent vacare legi Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר לָעָם֙ לְיוֹשְׁבֵ֣י יְרוּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם לָתֵ֕ת מְנָ֥ת הַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים וְהַלְוִיִּ֑ם לְמַ֥עַן יֶחֶזְק֖וּ בְּתוֹרַ֥ת יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: He commanded also the people that dwelt in Jerusalem, to give to the priests, and the Levites their portion, that they might attend to the law of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän sanoi kansalle, joka asui Jerusalemissa, että heidän piti antaman osan papeille ja Leviläisille, että he olisivat vireämmät Herran laissa.
verses.king_james: Moreover he commanded the people that dwelt in Jerusalem to give the portion of the priests and the Levites, that they might be encouraged in the law of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod cum percrebruisset in auribus multitudinis, plurimas obtulere primitias filii Israël frumenti, vini, et olei : mellis quoque, et omnium quæ gignit humus, decimas obtulerunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכִפְרֹ֣ץ הַדָּבָ֗ר הִרְבּ֤וּ בְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ רֵאשִׁ֣ית דָּגָ֗ן תִּיר֤וֹשׁ וְיִצְהָר֙ וּדְבַ֔שׁ וְכֹ֖ל תְּבוּאַ֣ת שָׂדֶ֑ה וּמַעְשַׂ֥ר הַכֹּ֛ל לָרֹ֖ב הֵבִֽיאוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Which when it was noised abroad in the ears of the people, the children of Israel offered in abundance the firstfruits of corn, wine, and oil, and honey: and brought the tithe of all things which the ground bringeth forth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin se sanottu oli, antoivat Israelin lapset paljon uutista jyvistä, viinasta, öljystä, hunajasta ja kaikkinaisesta pellon kasvusta, ja kymmenykset kaikista runsaasti.
verses.king_james: And as soon as the commandment came abroad, the children of Israel brought in abundance the firstfruits of corn, wine, and oil, and honey, and of all the increase of the field; and the tithe of all things brought they in abundantly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et filii Israël et Juda qui habitabant in urbibus Juda, obtulerunt decimas boum et ovium, decimasque sanctorum quæ voverant Domino Deo suo : atque universa portantes, fecerunt acervos plurimos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֧י יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל וִיהוּדָ֗ה הַיּוֹשְׁבִים֮ בְּעָרֵ֣י יְהוּדָה֒ גַּם־הֵ֗ם מַעְשַׂ֤ר בָּקָר֙ וָצֹ֔אן וּמַעְשַׂ֣ר קׇֽדָשִׁ֔ים הַמְקֻדָּשִׁ֖ים לַיהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵיהֶ֑ם הֵבִ֕יאוּ וַֽיִּתְּנ֖וּ עֲרֵמ֥וֹת עֲרֵמֽוֹת׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover the children of Israel and Juda, that dwelt in the cities of Juda, brought in the tithes of oxen, and sheep, and the tithes of holy things, which they had vowed to the Lord their God: and carrying them all, made many heaps.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Israelin ja Juudan lapset, jotka Juudan kaupungeissa asuivat, toivat myöskin kymmenykset karjasta ja lampaista ja pyhitetystä, jonka he Herralle Jumalallensa pyhittäneet olivat, ja asettivat eri läjiin.
verses.king_james: And concerning the children of Israel and Judah, that dwelt in the cities of Judah, they also brought in the tithe of oxen and sheep, and the tithe of holy things which were consecrated unto the Lord their God, and laid them by heaps.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mense tertio cœperunt acervorum jacere fundamenta, et mense septimo compleverunt eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּחֹ֙דֶשׁ֙ הַשְּׁלִשִׁ֔י הֵחֵ֥לּוּ הָעֲרֵמ֖וֹת לְיִסּ֑וֹד וּבַחֹ֥דֶשׁ הַשְּׁבִיעִ֖י כִּלּֽוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: In the third month they began to lay the foundations of the heaps, and in the seventh month, they finished them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kolmantena kuukautena rupesivat he panemaan läjiin, ja seitsemäntenä kuukautena päättivät.
verses.king_james: In the third month they began to lay the foundation of the heaps, and finished them in the seventh month.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque ingressi fuissent Ezechias et principes ejus, viderunt acervos, et benedixerunt Domino ac populo Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֙אוּ֙ יְחִזְקִיָּ֣הוּ וְהַשָּׂרִ֔ים וַיִּרְא֖וּ אֶת־הָעֲרֵמ֑וֹת וַֽיְבָרְכוּ֙ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֔ה וְאֵ֖ת עַמּ֥וֹ יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And when Ezechias and his princes came in, they saw the heaps, and they blessed the Lord and the people of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin Jehiskia tuli ylimmäisten kanssa ja näki läjät, kiittivät he Herraa ja hänen kansaansa Israelia.
verses.king_james: And when Hezekiah and the princes came and saw the heaps, they blessed the Lord, and his people Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Interrogavitque Ezechias sacerdotes et Levitas, cur ita jacerent acervi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּדְרֹ֣שׁ יְחִזְקִיָּ֗הוּ עַל־הַכֹּ֥הֲנִ֛ים וְהַלְוִיִּ֖ם עַל־הָעֲרֵמֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Ezechias asked the priests and the Levites, why the heaps lay so.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jehiskia kysyi papeilta ja Leviläisiltä läjistä.
verses.king_james: Then Hezekiah questioned with the priests and the Levites concerning the heaps.

verses.latin_vulgate: Respondit illi Azarias sacerdos primus de stirpe Sadoc, dicens : Ex quo cœperunt offerri primitiæ in domo Domini, comedimus, et saturati sumus, et remanserunt plurima, eo quod benedixerit Dominus populo suo : reliquarum autem copia est ista, quam cernis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלָ֗יו עֲזַרְיָ֧הוּ הַכֹּהֵ֛ן הָרֹ֖אשׁ לְבֵ֣ית צָד֑וֹק וַ֠יֹּ֠אמֶר מֵהָחֵ֨ל הַתְּרוּמָ֜ה לָבִ֣יא בֵית־יְהֹוָ֗ה אָכ֨וֹל וְשָׂב֤וֹעַ וְהוֹתֵר֙ עַד־לָר֔וֹב כִּ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ בֵּרַ֣ךְ אֶת־עַמּ֔וֹ וְהַנּוֹתָ֖ר אֶת־הֶהָמ֥וֹן הַזֶּֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Azarias the chief priest of the race of Sadoc answered him, saying: Since the firstfruits began to be offered in the house of the Lord, we have eaten, and have been filled, and abundance is left, because the Lord hath blessed his people: and of that which is left is this great store which thou seest.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Asaria, ylimmäinen pappi Zadokin huoneesta, puhui hänelle, sanoen: siitä ajasta, kuin he rupesivat ylennystä tuomaan Herran huoneesen, olemme me syöneet ja tulleet ravituiksi, ja tässä on vielä paljo tähteinä; sillä Herra on siunannut kansaansa, sentähden on tämä paljous jäänyt.
verses.king_james: And Azariah the chief priest of the house of Zadok answered him, and said, Since the people began to bring the offerings into the house of the Lord, we have had enough to eat, and have left plenty: for the Lord hath blessed his people; and that which is left is this great store.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præcepit igitur Ezechias ut præpararent horrea in domo Domini. Quod cum fecissent,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר יְחִזְקִיָּ֗הוּ לְהָכִ֧ין לְשָׁכ֛וֹת בְּבֵ֥ית יְהֹוָ֖ה וַיָּכִֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then Ezechias commanded to prepare storehouses in the house of the Lord. And when they had done so,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin kuningas käski valmistaa kammiot Herran huoneesen; ja he valmistivat,
verses.king_james: Then Hezekiah commanded to prepare chambers in the house of the Lord; and they prepared them,

verses.latin_vulgate: intulerunt tam primitias quam decimas, et quæcumque voverant, fideliter. Fuit autem præfectus eorum Chonenias Levita, et Semei frater ejus secundus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבִ֨יאוּ אֶת־הַתְּרוּמָ֧ה וְהַֽמַּעֲשֵׂ֛ר וְהַקֳּדָשִׁ֖ים בֶּאֱמוּנָ֑ה וַעֲלֵיהֶ֤ם נָגִיד֙ (כונניהו) [כׇּֽנַנְיָ֣הוּ] הַלֵּוִ֔י וְשִׁמְעִ֥י אָחִ֖יהוּ מִשְׁנֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: They brought in faithfully both the firstfruits, and the tithes, and all they had vowed. And the overseer of them was Chonenias the Levite, and Semei his brother was the second,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja panivat niihin ylennyksen ja kymmenykset, ja sen mikä pyhitetty oli, uskollisesti. Ja Kanania Leviläinen oli asetettu päämieheksi sen päälle ja Simei hänen veljensä toiseksi;
verses.king_james: And brought in the offerings and the tithes and the dedicated things faithfully: over which Cononiah the Levite was ruler, and Shimei his brother was the next.

verses.latin_vulgate: post quem Jahiel, et Azarias, et Nahath, et Asaël, et Jerimoth, Jozabad quoque, et Eliel, et Jesmachias, et Mahath, et Banaias, præpositi sub manibus Choneniæ et Semei fratris ejus, ex imperio Ezechiæ regis et Azariæ pontificis domus Dei, ad quos omnia pertinebant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וִיחִיאֵ֡ל וַ֠עֲזַזְיָ֠הוּ וְנַ֨חַת וַעֲשָׂהאֵ֜ל וִירִימ֤וֹת וְיֽוֹזָבָד֙ וֶאֱלִיאֵ֣ל וְיִסְמַכְיָ֔הוּ וּמַ֖חַת וּבְנָיָ֑הוּ פְּקִידִ֗ים מִיַּ֤ד (כונניהו) [כׇּֽנַנְיָ֙הוּ֙] וְשִׁמְעִ֣י אָחִ֔יו בְּמִפְקַד֙ יְחִזְקִיָּ֣הוּ הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ וַעֲזַרְיָ֖הוּ נְגִ֥יד בֵּית־הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And after him Jehiel, and Azarias, and Nahath, and Asael, and Jerimoth, and Jozabad, and Eliel, and Jesmachias, and Mahath, and Banaias, overseers under the hand of Chonenias, and Semei his brother, by the commandment of Ezechias the king, and Azarias the high priest of the house of God, to whom all things appertained.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jehiel, Asasia, Nabat, Asahel, Jerimot, Josabad, Eliel, Jismakia, Mahat ja Benaja, asetetut Kananialta, ja hänen veljeltänsä Simeiltä, kuningas Jehiskian käskyn jälkeen, ja Asarialta Jumalan huoneen päämieheltä;
verses.king_james: And Jehiel, and Azaziah, and Nahath, and Asahel, and Jerimoth, and Jozabad, and Eliel, and Ismachiah, and Mahath, and Benaiah, were overseers under the hand of Cononiah and Shimei his brother, at the commandment of Hezekiah the king, and Azariah the ruler of the house of God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Core vero filius Jemna Levites, et janitor orientalis portæ, præpositus erat iis quæ sponte offerebantur Domino, primitiisque et consecratis in Sancta sanctorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקוֹרֵ֨א בֶן־יִמְנָ֤ה הַלֵּוִי֙ הַשּׁוֹעֵ֣ר לַמִּזְרָ֔חָה עַ֖ל נִדְב֣וֹת הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים לָתֵת֙ תְּרוּמַ֣ת יְהֹוָ֔ה וְקׇדְשֵׁ֖י הַקֳּדָשִֽׁים׃
verses.douay_rheims: But Core the son of Jemna the Levite, the porter of the east gate, was overseer of the things which were freely offered to the Lord, and of the firstfruits and the things dedicated for the holy of holies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Kore Jimnan poika Leviläinen, ovenvartia idän puolella, oli Jumalan vapaaehtoisten lahjain päällä jakamassa niitä, mitkä Herralle annetut olivat ylennykseksi, ja kaikkein pyhimmän päällä.
verses.king_james: And Kore the son of Imnah the Levite, the porter toward the east, was over the freewill offerings of God, to distribute the oblations of the Lord, and the most holy things.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sub cura ejus Eden, et Benjamin, Jesue, et Semeias, Amarias quoque, et Sechenias in civitatibus sacerdotum, ut fideliter distribuerent fratribus suis partes, minoribus atque majoribus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַל־יָד֡וֹ עֵ֣דֶן וּ֠מִנְיָמִ֠ן וְיֵשׁ֨וּעַ וּֽשְׁמַעְיָ֜הוּ אֲמַרְיָ֧הוּ וּשְׁכַנְיָ֛הוּ בְּעָרֵ֥י הַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים בֶּאֱמוּנָ֑ה לָתֵ֤ת לַֽאֲחֵיהֶם֙ בְּמַחְלְק֔וֹת כַּגָּד֖וֹל כַּקָּטָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And under his charge were Eden, and Benjamin, Jesue, and Semeias, and Amarias, and Sechenias, in the cities of the priests, to distribute faithfully portions to their brethren, both little and great:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen kätensä alla olivat Eden, Miniamin, Jesua, Semaja, Amaria ja Sakania, pappein kaupungeissa: että heidän piti uskollisesti antaman osan veljillensä heidän järjestyksensä jälkeen, pienimmälle niinkuin suurimmallekin;
verses.king_james: And next him were Eden, and Miniamin, and Jeshua, and Shemaiah, Amariah, and Shecaniah, in the cities of the priests, in their set office, to give to their brethren by courses, as well to the great as to the small:

verses.latin_vulgate: exceptis maribus ab annis tribus et supra, cunctis qui ingrediebantur templum Domini, et quidquid per singulos dies conducebat in ministerio, atque observationibus juxta divisiones suas,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִלְּבַ֞ד הִתְיַחְשָׂ֣ם לִזְכָרִ֗ים מִבֶּ֨ן שָׁל֤וֹשׁ שָׁנִים֙ וּלְמַ֔עְלָה לְכׇל־הַבָּ֥א לְבֵית־יְהֹוָ֖ה לִדְבַר־י֣וֹם בְּיוֹמ֑וֹ לַעֲב֣וֹדָתָ֔ם בְּמִשְׁמְרוֹתָ֖ם כְּמַחְלְקוֹתֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Besides the males from three years old and upward, to all that went into the temple of the Lord, and whatsoever there was need of in the ministry, and their offices according to their courses, day by day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös niille, jotka luettiin miehenpuolesta, kolmesta ajastajastansa ja sen ylitse, kaikkein niiden seassa, jotka Herran huoneesen menivät, kukin päivänänsä heidän virkansa, vartionsa ja järjestyksensä jälkeen;
verses.king_james: Beside their genealogy of males, from three years old and upward, even unto every one that entereth into the house of the Lord, his daily portion for their service in their charges according to their courses;

verses.latin_vulgate: sacerdotibus per familias, et Levitis a vigesimo anno et supra, per ordines et turmas suas,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֨ת הִתְיַחֵ֤שׂ הַכֹּֽהֲנִים֙ לְבֵ֣ית אֲבוֹתֵיהֶ֔ם וְהַ֨לְוִיִּ֔ם מִבֶּ֛ן עֶשְׂרִ֥ים שָׁנָ֖ה וּלְמָ֑עְלָה בְּמִשְׁמְרוֹתֵיהֶ֖ם בְּמַחְלְקוֹתֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: To the priests by their families, and to the Levites from the twentieth year and upward, by their classes and companies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös niille, jotka olivat pappein luvussa heidän isäinsä huoneissa, ja Leviläiset kahdestakymmenestä ajastajastansa ja sen ylitse, heidän vartioissansa, heidän järjestyksensä jälkeen;
verses.king_james: Both to the genealogy of the priests by the house of their fathers, and the Levites from twenty years old and upward, in their charges by their courses;

verses.latin_vulgate: universæque multitudini tam uxoribus quam liberis eorum utriusque sexus, fideliter cibi de his quæ sanctificata fuerant, præbebantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְהִתְיַחֵ֗שׂ בְּכׇל־טַפָּ֛ם נְשֵׁיהֶ֛ם וּבְנֵיהֶ֥ם וּבְנוֹתֵיהֶ֖ם לְכׇל־קָהָ֑ל כִּ֥י בֶאֱמוּנָתָ֖ם יִתְקַדְּשׁוּ־קֹֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to all the multitude, both to their wives, and to their children of both sexes, victuals were given faithfully out of the things that had been sanctified.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte niille, jotka luetut olivat lastensa, vaimoinsa, poikainsa ja tytärtensä seassa, koko seurakunnan seassa; sillä he pyhittivät uskollisesti sen pyhitetyn;
verses.king_james: And to the genealogy of all their little ones, their wives, and their sons, and their daughters, through all the congregation: for in their set office they sanctified themselves in holiness:

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et filiorum Aaron per agros, et suburbana urbium singularum, dispositi erant viri, qui partes distribuerent universo sexui masculino de sacerdotibus et Levitis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִבְנֵי֩ אַהֲרֹ֨ן הַכֹּהֲנִ֜ים בִּשְׂדֵ֨י מִגְרַ֤שׁ עָֽרֵיהֶם֙ בְּכׇל־עִ֣יר וָעִ֔יר אֲנָשִׁ֕ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר נִקְּב֖וּ בְּשֵׁמ֑וֹת לָתֵ֣ת מָנ֗וֹת לְכׇל־זָכָר֙ בַּכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים וּלְכׇל־הִתְיַחֵ֖שׂ בַּלְוִיִּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Also of the sons of Aaron who were in the fields and in the suburbs of each city, there were men appointed, to distribute portions to all the males, among the priests and the Levites.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös papeille Aaronin pojille esikaupunkein kedolla heidän kaupungeissansa, kussakin kaupungissa miehet nimiltänsä nimitetyt, että heidän piti osan antaman kaikille miehenpuolille pappein seassa ja kaikille niille, jotka Leviläisten sekaan luetut olivat.
verses.king_james: Also of the sons of Aaron the priests, which were in the fields of the suburbs of their cities, in every several city, the men that were expressed by name, to give portions to all the males among the priests, and to all that were reckoned by genealogies among the Levites.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit ergo Ezechias universa quæ diximus in omni Juda : operatusque est bonum et rectum, et verum coram Domino Deo suo,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֧עַשׂ כָּזֹ֛את יְחִזְקִיָּ֖הוּ בְּכׇל־יְהוּדָ֑ה וַיַּ֨עַשׂ הַטּ֤וֹב וְהַיָּשָׁר֙ וְהָ֣אֱמֶ֔ת לִפְנֵ֖י יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Ezechias did all things which we have said in all Juda, and wrought that which was good, and right, and truth, before the Lord his God,
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin teki Jehiskia kaikessa Juudassa; ja hän teki mikä hyvä, oikia ja totuus oli Herran hänen Jumalansa edessä.
verses.king_james: And thus did Hezekiah throughout all Judah, and wrought that which was good and right and truth before the Lord his God.

verses.latin_vulgate: in universa cultura ministerii domus Domini, juxta legem et cæremonias, volens requirere Deum suum in toto corde suo : fecitque, et prosperatus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְכׇֽל־מַעֲשֶׂ֞ה אֲשֶׁר־הֵחֵ֣ל ׀ בַּעֲבוֹדַ֣ת בֵּית־הָאֱלֹהִ֗ים וּבַתּוֹרָה֙ וּבַמִּצְוָ֔ה לִדְרֹ֖שׁ לֵאלֹהָ֑יו בְּכׇל־לְבָב֥וֹ עָשָׂ֖ה וְהִצְלִֽיחַ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: In all the service of the house of the Lord according to the law and the ceremonies, desiring to seek his God with all his heart, and he did it and prospered.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikissa teoissansa, jotka hän alkoi Jumalan huoneen palveluksessa, lain ja käskyn jälkeen, etsiäksensä Jumalaansa: sen teki hän kaikesta sydämestänsä, sentähden hän myös menestyi.
verses.king_james: And in every work that he began in the service of the house of God, and in the law, and in the commandments, to seek his God, he did it with all his heart, and prospered.
